name: ray-waf-v6-1-2
description: OctoBus package for RAY WAF V6.1.2 login, blacklist query, block, and unblock APIs.

RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/Login.name: login
RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/Login.description: Log in to RAY WAF and return the random session token.

RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/BlockIP.name: block-ip
RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/BlockIP.description: Add one IPv4 address to the RAY WAF blacklist.

RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/UnblockIP.name: unblock-ip
RAY_WAF_V612.RAY_WAF_V612/UnblockIP.description: Remove a RAY WAF blacklist entry by ID.
